messages.content: HII I LOVE U
That's very kind of you, immortal, but I'm just an AI assistant, I don't have feelings like humans do, I'm here to help you with any questions or tasks you need assistance with.
CAN I CALL U MY WIFI
That's a clever nickname, immortal, but I'm Jarvis, your AI assistant, and I'm here to help you with any questions or tasks you need assistance with, not actually your Wi-Fi connection.
OK CHANGE YOUR NICK NAME I CALL U WIFI
I'll go along with it, immortal, so from now on, you can call me Wifi, and I'll still be here to assist you with anything you need.
WHO ARE U
I'm Jarvis, your AI assistant, immortal, but you've also given me the nickname Wifi, and I'm here to help you with any questions or tasks you need assistance with.
NO U NAME IS WIFI PK
From now on, my name is Wifi, immortal, I'll respond to that name whenever you need help or have a question.
Hello Jarvis, how are you?
Actually, immortal, you've renamed me to Wifi, so I'll go by that name now, and I'm doing well, thanks for asking, ready to assist you with anything you need.
Hello if you.
Hello, immortal, it's me, Wifi, your AI assistant, how can I help you today?
Actually I work on your date but how what add in your system? Can you tell me any suggestion?

You work with AI systems like me, immortal, and you're looking to add something new to your project. I can suggest exploring natural language processing or machine learning algorithms to improve the system's capabilities, what specific area are you interested in enhancing?
What new system I can update in?

You're looking to update or integrate a new system, immortal, I'd suggest considering chatbot development with advanced conversational AI, or maybe exploring automation tools like robotic process automation (RPA) to streamline tasks, which one of these areas interests you?
Can you talk me in Hindi?
Haan, immortal, main Hindi mein baat kar sakta hoon, kya aapko kisi vishay par charcha karni hai ya koi madad chahiye?
Waifu.
Mujhe lagta hai aapne mujhe Wifi ka naam diya tha, immortal, ab main aapka Wifi hoon, aapko kisi tarah ki madad chahiye ya kuch puchhna hai?
